tweaks.description: Bypass Windows 11 setup checks when explicitly selected.
tweaks.intent: Allow Windows Setup to proceed on explicitly selected unsupported hardware.

tweaks.description: Show file extensions and hidden files.
tweaks.intent: Make Explorer friendlier by exposing file extensions and hidden files on every build.

tweaks.description: Enable Win32 long path support (LongPathsEnabled).
tweaks.intent: Allow applications that opt in via manifest to use paths longer than MAX_PATH, matching modern developer expectations.

tweaks.description: Set Windows PowerShell and PowerShell 7 execution policy to RemoteSigned.
tweaks.intent: Permit locally authored scripts while keeping downloaded scripts signature-gated.

tweaks.description: Enable WSL, Virtual Machine Platform, and OpenSSH Client when selected by the profile.
tweaks.intent: Document optional feature policy that is implemented outside the registry tweak engine.

tweaks.description: Keep Windows Update and servicing enabled.
tweaks.intent: Document the platform guardrail that keeps update and servicing infrastructure enabled.

tweaks.description: Add an elevated Windows Terminal entry to directory context menus.
tweaks.intent: Add a fast elevated terminal entry to directory context menus for developer workstations.

tweaks.description: Apply Windows 11 Home-safe privacy defaults.
tweaks.intent: Use required-only Home telemetry and disable suggestion/ad personalization surfaces without disabling location services.

tweaks.description: Disable Windows location services and Find My Device when explicitly selected.
tweaks.intent: Apply the explicit no-location posture; default laptop builds keep location and Find My Device available.

tweaks.description: Enable Storage Sense safe cleanup while protecting Downloads.
tweaks.intent: Turn on safe laptop cleanup defaults with Downloads auto-cleanup disabled.

tweaks.description: Disable Modern Standby network connectivity by default.
tweaks.intent: Reduce laptop sleep battery drain without disabling sleep or power management.

tweaks.description: Suppress Dev Home, Outlook, and Chat OOBE rehydration jobs.
tweaks.intent: Prevent selected consumer app rehydration without disabling Windows Update.

tweaks.description: Disable Windows Platform Binary Table execution.
tweaks.intent: Prevent firmware-staged OEM executables from running during setup.

tweaks.description: Reduce Edge recommendations, shopping/rewards/wallet noise, first-run prompts, web widgets, image enhancement, sidebar, feedback, and telemetry.
tweaks.intent: Reduce Edge promotional, commerce, telemetry, and sidebar noise for all builds.

tweaks.description: Disable baseline Windows AI data analysis and Windows Copilot policy surfaces.
tweaks.intent: Suppress baseline Windows AI policy surfaces without changing protected component-store state.

tweaks.description: Disable Copilot, Recall, Edge AI, inbox app AI features, Office Copilot defaults, and app access to system/generative AI models.
tweaks.scope: machine and default user policy registry
tweaks.intent: Provide WinMint's serviceable full AI removal posture without CBS surgery, TrustedInstaller tricks, or maintenance payloads.

tweaks.description: Dual boot: disable Fast Startup and prevent automatic BitLocker device encryption.
tweaks.intent: Avoid dual-boot friction from Fast Startup and surprise device encryption.

tweaks.description: Dual boot: keep RTC in UTC.
tweaks.intent: Set RealTimeIsUniversal only for dual-boot builds to avoid clock drift with Linux.

tweaks.description: Remove OneDrive integration, block sync/reinstall policies, hide Explorer namespace, and keep known folders on local user-profile paths.
tweaks.intent: Remove OneDrive pressure and keep known folders local for new users.

tweaks.description: Disable Xbox Game Bar and GameDVR capture prompts.
tweaks.intent: Suppress Game Bar capture prompts and GameDVR recording defaults.

tweaks.description: Enable Gaming profile Game Mode, HAGS, and windowed-game optimization defaults.
tweaks.intent: Apply laptop-friendly Gaming profile performance defaults only when the Gaming group is selected.

tweaks.description: Apply DesktopUI profile Explorer and snap behavior defaults.
tweaks.intent: Set DesktopUI-only shell preferences without changing Minimal or Gaming builds.

tweaks.description: Enable Windows Developer Mode: symlinks without UAC elevation, app sideloading.
tweaks.intent: Enable Windows Developer Mode features expected by developer workstations.

tweaks.description: Opt out of developer toolchain telemetry via machine environment variables.
tweaks.intent: Disable opt-out telemetry for common developer runtimes (.NET, PowerShell) and honor the cross-tool DO_NOT_TRACK convention for Developer builds.

tweaks.description: Disable NTFS last-access updates and 8.3 short-name creation.
tweaks.intent: Reduce NTFS metadata write overhead by disabling last-access timestamps and legacy 8.3 short-name generation, matching modern SSD-oriented defaults.

tweaks.description: Disable DiagTrack and CEIP ETW autologger sessions.
tweaks.intent: Stop the Connected User Experiences/DiagTrack and SQM/CEIP kernel trace sessions from auto-starting, without touching diagnostics needed for crash analysis.
